title: Control of area; rules and regulations
doc_html:
§752.  Control of area; rules and regulations

The commissioner of wildlife and fisheries has absolute control and authority concerning the use of the lands and shall adopt rules and regulations controlling the area.
doc_text:
§752.  Control of area; rules and regulations
The commissioner of wildlife and fisheries has absolute control and authority concerning the use of the lands and shall adopt rules and regulations controlling the area.
